message:
docs(storage): update rel_path_cached doc comment to match symlink-safe implementation

The doc comment still described the old fast-path/slow-path approach,
but the implementation was changed in 6beade6 to always canonicalize
the target path first. Align the docs with the current behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
